notes: SHIP v1.14.320 - bottom-nav fit pass (reconciled from web-Claude bundle 'files (80).zip'). CONTEXT: web-Claude authored a nav tweak on top of .318 and ALSO stamped it .319 - colliding with the .319 icon refresh already shipped. Their sw.js was identical to live and their dct-ios.html differed by exactly 2 CSS lines; re-applied those onto live as .320 (never dropped their files in - that would have reverted the .319 icons). TWO CSS edits, both #rd-botnav: (1) NAV LABELS #rd-botnav .blabel font-size 12.5->11px, letter-spacing 3.5->2px, + white-space:nowrap - shrinks + no-wraps COMMAND/WORK/CRASH CART/EXIT so 'CRASH CART' (the widest, 2-word label) stops wrapping at 390px now that EXIT shares the nav row. Verbatim from web-Claude. (2) EXIT #rd-exit min-width 64->56px + margin-left 4->6px, but margin-right STAYS 48px. web-Claude's bundle set margin-right:2px (flush right) which would have REVERTED the .318 'move EXIT left 1/2 inch' - owner reviewed a/b/c renders at 390px and chose B: keep EXIT 1/2 inch in (48px) + take the shrink. So EXIT keeps its .318 set-apart position; only its width/left-margin tightened to buy the tabs a little room. Gates: brace balance unchanged (2 value-only CSS edits), all 4 inline <script> blocks compile, sw.js compiles, version triple .319->.320 lockstep, CRLF working tree preserved (Edit-based, autocrlf normalizes to LF - clean diff). ?legacy=1 byte-identical (#rd-botnav is redesign-only). Browser-verified @390px: all 4 labels fit one line no wrap, EXIT sits ~1/2 inch in with red glow intact, reactor rail still thirds-aligned. DEVICE-VERIFY (John): phone bottom nav - CRASH CART no longer wraps, labels a touch smaller, EXIT still 1/2 inch in from the right edge with red glow. NOTE: the .316-.320 nav work is still device-unverified as a stack. NEXT: N-12 phase stepper (backlog).
